dataList.name: 脚力[卯]
dataList.desc: 攻撃<color=#7C5737>速度値</color>低于<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的<color=#ffffff>目標</color>時，使其増加的[Burst]強度或対其施加的[Burst]層数額外+2并使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>+10%

dataList.name: 气勢[卯]
dataList.desc: 命中帯有[BurstAgility]的<color=#ffffff>敵方単位</color>時，対<color=#ffffff>目標</color>施加2層[Burst](<color=#7C5738>每回合</color>最多6次)

dataList.name: 圧制[卯]
dataList.desc: 使用技能時，若<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的<color=#7C5737>速度値</color>高于<color=#ffffff>目標</color>至少2点，則使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+1

dataList.name: 幼兄
dataList.desc:
<color=#7C5738>回合開始</color>時，使包括<color=#ffffff>自身</color>在内的<color=#ffffff>全体</color><color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>恢復10点<color=#81BBE8>理智値</color>
<color=#ffffff>自身</color>受到的[Combustion]、[Laceration]、[Vibration]、[Burst]与[Sinking]<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>-20%

dataList.name: 仇怨紋身
dataList.desc: 本場戦斗中每有1名属于中指的<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>陣亡，使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得1層[AttackUp](最多5層)

dataList.name: 変得愈加蓬乱的頭発
dataList.desc: 拼点失敗2次后，<color=#7C5738>下回合</color>対<color=#ffffff>自身</color>施加6層[DefenseDown]

dataList.name: 復仇帳簿
dataList.desc:
<color=#ffffff>自身</color>或属于中指的<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>受到攻撃時，対攻撃者施加1層[MiddleFingerBook]，并在<color=#7C5738>下回合</color>使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得1層[AttackUp](<color=#7C5738>每回合</color>最多5次)
- 属于中指的<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>被技能<color=#7C5738>撃殺</color>后，額外対攻撃者施加2層[MiddleFingerBook]

dataList.name: 負傷戦斗
dataList.desc: <color=#7C5737>関峠開始</color>時，失去<color=#61DA61>体力</color>上限40%的<color=#61DA61>体力</color>(包括<color=#ffffff>部位</color>)

dataList.name: 梳理発型
dataList.desc: 陷入恐慌時，<color=#7C5738>下回合</color>開始時解除恐慌，<color=#81BBE8>理智値</color>恢復為0点
